name: Christmas Hard Candy (Also Cor Ii)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 to 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon oil or peppermint oil,  see note
1 teaspoon red or green food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan, combine the sugar, corn syrup, and water.
2. Cook over medium-high heat until the candy thermometer reaches 300°F (hard-crack stage), stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from the heat; stir in the oil and food coloring, keeping your face away from the mixture as the odor is very strong.
4. Immediately pour onto an oiled cookie sheet.
5. Allow to cool completely, then break into pieces.
6. Store in airtight containers.
YIELD: about 2 pounds
